title: Religious Scholar: "The Boy From the Exorcist Became a NASA Engineer"
summary: This interview discusses the case of the boy whose story inspired The Exorcist movie, who later became a NASA aerospace engineer. The conversation touches on physiological phenomena associated with possession and mediumship, particularly relating to water and hydration.

acronyms.definition: United States government agency responsible for aerospace and space exploration

key_claims.claim: The boy whose story was used for The Exorcist movie grew up to be an aerospace engineer who worked for NASA
After the exorcism, the boy experienced excessive urination to an unusual degree
Excessive urination and water-related physiological phenomena are observed in other cases of mediumship
Water may hold more semantic content than currently understood
